headline: Q1 Discount Retailer Earnings Review: First Prize Goes to Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST)
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q1 behind us, let’s have a look at Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) and its peers.
